concerns.detail: Accusatory attack identifying the editor as professor Chaowei Xiao and alleging ulterior motives/admission failure to discredit criticism.
concerns.excerpt: 再删你是Chaowei Xiao，有种来rebuttal!!! ... 能黑成这样的, 肯定是别有用心的人了xs 基本可以定位了, 没申请好想想自己原因吧兄弟

concerns.detail: Personal insult using clown emoji to dismiss a critic's claim of post deletion.
Mocking personal financial losses in real estate speculation, unrelated to academic advising practices.
